corrections.current: γὰρ διηγήσατο αὐτῷ τὰ ῥήματα τῆς Βασιλίσσης
corrections.correct: γὰρ διηγήσατο αὐτοῖς τὰ ῥήματα τῆς Βασιλίσσης
corrections.note: Image clearly reads αὐτοῖς, not αὐτῷ.

corrections.current: ἀκουσθήτω ὁ νόμος ὁ ὑπὸ τοῦ Βασιλέως ὃν ἐὰν ποιῇ
corrections.correct: ἀκουσθήτω ὁ νόμος ὁ ὑπὸ τοῦ Βασιλέως ὃν ἐὰν ποιήσῃ
corrections.note: Verb form in image is ποιήσῃ, not ποιῇ.
Comma visible after θυμοῦ before section marker.
Printed Latin abbreviation is asterisc, not aster.
Apparatus prints accented Greek form ἐπιφλέγματος.
Printed reading is οσα (abbreviated/ligatured), not numeral-like ι̅ο̅.
Printed note reads vid, without trailing (b).

corrections.location: Esth I 21 lemma τω βασιλει και τοις αρχου
corrections.current: τω βασιλει και τοις αρχου sup ras Bab
corrections.correct: τω βασιλει και τοις αρχον sup ras Bab
corrections.note: N is missing before sup ras; image reads αρχον.

corrections.current: μνημονεύων....αὐτήν] καθα εποιησεν και οσα αυτην κατεκρίθη A
corrections.correct: μνημονεύων....αὐτήν] καθα εποιησεν και οσα αυτην κατεκρίθη A
corrections.note: Apparatus prints unaccented αυτην, not αυτην with grave/acute? Existing has accented form elsewhere; normalize to printed unaccented apparatus style.
Initial theta is present in αφθορα.

notes: Running head matches. Body mostly correct, but marginal line numbers 16–22 and 2–3 have been transcribed into the body; since they are page line indicators rather than verse text, they should ideally be removed, but individual removals are numerous and obvious from layout. Apparatus generally matches but contains several small misreadings.
